scripts.all:update-packages: cd ./packages/api && bun update && cd ../components && bun update && cd ../server && bun update && cd ../shared && bun update && cd ../templates && bun update && cd ../types && bun update
scripts.all:update-versions: cd ./packages/api && npm version patch --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../components && npm version patch --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../server && npm version patch --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../shared && npm version patch --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../templates && npm version patch --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../types && npm version patch --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.all:typecheck: bun run typecheck:types && bun run typecheck:server && bun run typecheck:shared && bun run typecheck:components && bun run typecheck:api
scripts.all:build: bun run build:api && bun run build:components && bun run build:server && bun run build:shared && bun run build:templates && bun run build:types
scripts.all:beta: bun run beta:api && bun run beta:components && bun run beta:server && bun run beta:shared && bun run beta:templates && bun run beta:types
scripts.all:prod: bun run prod:api && bun run prod:components && bun run prod:server && bun run prod:shared && bun run prod:templates && bun run prod:types
scripts.beta:api: cd packages/api && npm version prerelease --preid=beta && npm publish --tag beta
scripts.beta:components: cd packages/components && npm version prerelease --preid=beta && npm publish --tag beta
scripts.beta:server: cd packages/server && npm version prerelease --preid=beta && npm publish --tag beta
scripts.beta:shared: cd packages/shared && npm version prerelease --preid=beta && npm publish --tag beta
scripts.beta:templates: cd packages/templates && npm version prerelease --preid=beta && npm publish --tag beta
scripts.beta:types: cd packages/types && npm version prerelease --preid=beta && npm publish --tag beta
scripts.prod:api: cd packages/api && npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm publish --tag latest
scripts.prod:components: cd packages/components && npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm publish --tag latest
scripts.prod:server: cd packages/server && npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm publish --tag latest
scripts.prod:shared: cd packages/shared && npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm publish --tag latest
scripts.prod:templates: cd packages/templates && npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm publish --tag latest
scripts.prod:types: cd packages/types && npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm publish --tag latest
